text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I had a lot of chocolate left over, so...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I bought way too many cookies, so...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I figured I'd give her something, since it was
Valentine's Day and all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But then I saw her face... and I just couldn't.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So now a month has passed, and it's White Day.
What happened to the chocolate?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...I have it with me, just in case. I mean—it's not
like I'm feeling regretful or anything.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So why don't you eat the cookies?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Cause I already decided they were for her, and it'd be lame to change my mind. Don't think that means I want to do this either.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I just feel all awkward... It's like, I won't get rid of
that feelin' unless I hand this over.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mhm, mhm, I see...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What would you do? You would eat it, wouldn't
you? 'Cause that's the right thing to do, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Umm, I'm not totally sure, but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: If it were me, I'd give it to her.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Urk...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But don't you think it's strange to give chocolates
on White Day when you never received anything
on Valentine's?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't think that really matters... You want to give it to her, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure why you specifically came to me for
advice...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But isn't it the same as how you run when you feel
like running? We do things because we want to.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Besides, I think she'd be happy to get something!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't matter the time or the reason! She'll see
how much you care for her! ♪

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! This isn't 'cause I care for her...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you don't? Then why is it you couldn't
throw them away or eat them yourself?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You do want to give them to her, don't you?! If it were me, I'd follow my heart, I think. ♪

text_block_list.name: Scarlet & Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey!
Um!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uh oh... This doesn't look so good. Think it's
gonna bust?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Who knows... You can always ask them the next
time we're all together if you're curious.
